login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Login and Take Control of Your Workflow.

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, etc.)

security.title: Two-Factor Authentication
security.description: Add an extra layer of security using Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or any TOTP app
security.enterCodeToRegen: Enter your current 2FA code to generate new backup codes:
security.confirmDisable: Enter your 2FA code to confirm disabling:
security.scanInstructions: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP app:
security.cantScan: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
security.confirmSetup: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to confirm setup:
security.saveBackupCodes: Save these backup codes — they won't be shown again:
security.enableDescription: Protect your account with a time-based one-time password from your phone. Works with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, and more.

preferences.languageRegionDesc: Set your language, timezone, and format preferences

errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before logging in
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

registration.tagline: Simplify your workflow and accomplish more with Practical Manager. Your data is safe with us.
registration.inviteLinkSubtext: Complete the form below to create your account.
registration.successMsg: A verification email has been sent to your address.
registration.successMsg2: Please check your inbox and verify your email to continue.
registration.successMsg3: If you don't see the email, please look in your spam or junk folder.
registration.emailResentSuccess: Verification email resent! Please check your inbox.
registration.emailResentFail: Failed to resend verification email. Please try again later.

errors.emailMustMatchInvite: You must use the invited email: {{email}}
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordNeedsUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
errors.passwordNeedsNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
errors.mustAgreeTerms: You must agree to the terms.
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists. Would you like to sign in instead?
errors.emailInvalidDetailed: Please enter a valid email address.

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Track and achieve your objectives
goals.fetchError: Could not fetch goals. Please ensure the backend server is running.

toast.createFailed: Failed to create goal. Please try again.

confirm.deleteGoal: Are you sure you want to delete this goal? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete: Delete {{count}} goal(s)? This action cannot be undone.
